case_title: ANN LORRAINE A. OLAGUER VS. B & A TOWING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-07-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANN LORRAINE A. OLAGUER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT B&A TOWING. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED TODAY, 8/2/16. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING WAS FILED ON 7/15/16. TO DATE, NO ORDER HAS BEEN ISSUED ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO STIPULATE TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANN LORRAINE A. OLAGUER & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ROBERT BILAFER, MANAGER AT B&A TOWING. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT B & A TOWING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLAGUER, ANN LORRAINE A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT B & A TOWING A TOWING COMPANY THAT REMOVES A VEHICLE FROM PRIVATE PROPERTY IN COMPLIANCE WITH CVC 22658(L) IS NOT RESPONSIBLE IN A SITUATION RELATING TO THE VALIDITY OF THE REMOVAL. DEFENDANT COMPLIED WITH CVC 22658(L). (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLAGUER, ANN LORRAINE A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT B & A TOWING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE - $0.00 SERVED JUN-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT B & A TOWING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT B & A TOWING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OLAGUER, ANN LORRAINE A. AS TO DEFENDANT B & A TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANN LORRAINE OLAGUER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT B & A TOWING'S REPRESENTATIVE ROBERT BILAFA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/26/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
